data.name: Horny Sakura
data.detailed_description:
Horny Sakura is a puzzle game, the ultimate goal of which is to swap the blocks to collect the image.
But remember, the purpose of this game is to let you relax and enjoy the process.
To do this, we added a minimalistic interface and relaxing music.

Features:
Relaxing puzzle game.
Beautiful girls.
Beautiful music.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 10 64bit, Windows® 8.1 64bit, Windows® 7 SP1 64bit
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-3550
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 560
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
